evals.prompt: How do I find someone's email address in Skrapp?
evals.expected_output: Guidance on using Email Finder with name + company/domain

assertions.name: mentions_name_and_domain_input
assertions.description: Explains name + domain input for finding emails

assertions.name: mentions_success_rate_or_credits
assertions.description: Mentions 92% success rate or credit usage

evals.prompt: How do I bulk enrich a CSV of leads with Skrapp?
evals.expected_output: Guidance on Data Enrichment bulk upload workflow

assertions.name: mentions_csv_upload
assertions.description: Mentions CSV/Excel upload for bulk enrichment

assertions.name: mentions_ai_fields
assertions.description: Mentions AI Fields such as buying role, seniority, or function

evals.prompt: How do I use the Skrapp API to verify an email address?
evals.expected_output: Guidance on Email Verifier API endpoint
